zh.Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, England: 英國波克夏伊頓 海斯廷斯
zh.Chelsworth, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可傑爾斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery St Philibert於大約1326年出生在英國波克夏伊頓 海斯廷斯時，她的父親John St Philibert35歲，母親Ada Botetourt33歲。她和Baron Plaiz Richard de Plaiz至少有2個兒子。她去世於1360年2月18日之後在英國素福爾可傑爾斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery St Philibert于大约1326年出生在英国波克夏伊頓 海斯廷斯时，她的父亲John St Philibert35岁，母亲Ada Botetourt33岁。她和Baron Plaiz Richard de Plaiz至少有2个儿子。她去世于1360年2月18日之后在英国素福爾可傑爾斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: St
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Southern French: variant of   St  .   Romain  .

variants.name: Romain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Alain, Altagrace, Aurore, Camille, Dominique, Edele, Georges, Henri, Jacques, Jean-Marie, Jean-Michel, Jeanmarie.
French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and English: variant of   Roman  .

nameMeanings.name: Philibert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Fernand, Mirielle, Pascale, Pierrot.

French: from the personal name Philibert, from ancient Germanic Filuberht, composed of the elements fila ‘much, very’ + berht ‘bright’, which was borne by a 7th-century Christian saint, abbot of Jumièges. The spelling has been influenced by personal names of Greek origin based on philein ‘to love’, e.g. Philip .

variants.name: Philbert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Monique.  German Kurt.
French and German (Bavaria): from the personal name Philbert, from ancient Germanic Filuberht (see Philibert ).

variants.name: Philip
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Varughese, Mathai, Babu, Reji, Anil, Binu, Neena, Prema, Raju, Reena, Susheela, Aleykutty.

Scottish, English, German, Dutch, and Jewish: from the Greek personal name Philippos (from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’). In the New Testament this name is borne by one of the apostles; it was also borne by various other early Christian saints. It owes part of its popularity to the medieval romances about Alexander the Great, whose father was Philip of Macedon. As a Jewish name, it represents a borrowing of the personal name from Christians. As a Highland Scottish surname, it represents an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhilib ‘son of Philip’. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Spanish Felipe , Catalan Felip, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Slovenian or Croatian Filip , Albanian Filipi , and their derivatives (see examples at Philips ). The name Philip is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Philipose and Pothen ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Phillip .
French (southern) and Breton (Finistère): variant of   Philippe  .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery St Philibert was born about 1326, in Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, England, her father, John St Philibert, was 35 and her mother, Ada Botetourt, was 33. She had at least 2 sons with Baron Plaiz Richard de Plaiz. She died after 18 February 1360, in Chelsworth, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery St Philibert est née environ 1326, à Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, John St Philibert, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Ada Botetourt, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Baron Plaiz Richard de Plaiz. Elle est décédée après 18 février 1360, à Chelsworth, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery St Philibert um 1326 in Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John St Philibert 35 und ihre Mutter Ada Botetourt 33. Sie hatte mit Baron Plaiz Richard de Plaiz mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb nach 18. Februar 1360 in Chelsworth, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery St Philibert è nata il circa 1326 nel Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, England, sua padre, John St Philibert, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Ada Botetourt, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Baron Plaiz Richard de Plaiz. Morì dopo il 18 febbraio 1360, nel Chelsworth, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery St Philibertが約1326年にイギリスバークシュアイアエアトン ハスティングズで生まれた時，父John St Philibertは35歳，母Ada Botetourtは33歳であった。彼女はBaron Plaiz Richard de Plaizとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1360年2月18日以後にイギリススフォルクチェルスウオルスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery St Philibert(이)가 대략 1326년 영국 버크실르 이턴 하스틴그스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John St Philibert(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ada Botetourt(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Baron Plaiz Richard de Plaiz(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 2월 18일 이후 영국 수폴크 첼스워스에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1326–after 18 February 1360: ойролцоогоор 1326 он–1360 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 18–наас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery St Philibert nasceu aproximadamente 1326, em Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John St Philibert, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Ada Botetourt, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Baron Plaiz Richard de Plaiz. Ela faleceu após 18 de fevereiro de 1360, em Chelsworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery St Philibert родилась около 1326 г. в местности эатон хастингс, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John St Philibert было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Ada Botetourt, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Baron Plaiz Richard de Plaiz. Она умерла после 18 февраль 1360 г. в местности челсворт, суффолк, Англия.

sm.about 1326–after 18 February 1360: e tusa o le 1326–ina ua ma'ea le 18 Fepuari 1360

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery St Philibert nació aproximadamente 1326, en Eaton Hastings, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John St Philibert, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Ada Botetourt, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Baron Plaiz Richard de Plaiz. Murió después de 18 de febrero de 1360, en Chelsworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
